title: HG Natural Stone Worktop Cleaner, Daily Kitchen Countertop Spray – 500ml
features: HG Natural Stone Worktop Cleaner: An effective kitchen counter-top cleaner, safe to use on all types of natural stone. Ideal for marble, quartz, travertine, blue stone, granite, cement tops and more
Versatile kitchen counter top cleaner: Formulated to be gentle on real stone, whilst removing dirt, food stains, bacteria, cooking splashes and deposits from delicate kitchen surfaces daily
Streak-free shine: The work surface cleaner spray helps protect the structure of the stone with its special formula, so your granite or stone worktop will show its natural beauty day in and day out
Easy to use HG cleaning spray: Spray the kitchen top, then wipe it off with a clean cloth. On stubborn or dried-in dirt, leave the liquid to absorb for a few minutes before removing

Includes: 1 x HG Worktop Cleaner, 500ml. Discover the full range of HG professional household cleaning products, including HG Mould Remover, grout cleaner, glass cleaner spray and all surface cleaners
description: Product Description HG Natural Stone Worktop Cleaner was specially developed for quick, streak-free, safe daily cleaning of stone worktops. This product is ideal for gently yet effectively cleaning away grease and other grime safely. It’s safe to use on marble, quartz, travertine, blue stone, granite and cement counter-tops. This natural stone worktop cleaner even helps protect the structure of the natural stone. The kitchen spray quickly and easily removes day-to-day dirt, such as oil, cooking liquids, and mild scale from counter tops, making it an effective daily degreaser. Kitchen heavy duty spray cleaner is suitable for use on every type of natural stone surface, without damaging the surface. Discover HG professional's wide range of specialist multi surface cleaning products and all purpose cleaner sprays for your home, office and outside space. Includes: 1 x HG Stone Worktop Cleaner, 500ml spray Instructions: 1. Spray onto work surface or kitchen island. 2. Wipe away with a damp cloth. 3. On stubborn or dried-in dirt, leave the liquid to absorb for a few minutes before wiping off. Why not try our HG Mould Spray, tile grout cleaner, glass cleaner, induction hob cleaner and HG Limescale Remover (sold separately), to leave your kitchen sparkling clean? Directions Turn the nozzle on the front side either a quarter of a turn to the left or right (STREAM / SPRAY). Spray the surface to be cleaned with HG Natural Stone Kitchen Top Cleaner and wipe the surface with a clean cloth (can be dampened). For stubborn dried-in grime leave HG Natural Stone Kitchen Top Cleaner to penetrate for a few minutes (if necessary use a sponge to loosen the grime). For extra gloss we recommend polishing the treated surface with a dry cloth or tea towel afterwards. Turn the nozzle a quarter of turn after use (OFF). TIP: to protect your kitchen top against the penetration of fat, grime and stains we recommend the application of HG Top Protector. Attention: Do not spray HG Natural Stone Kitchen Top Cleaner directly onto foods. Do not use scouring agents on your kitchen top as that could leave mat and tarnished areas. Box Contains 1 x HG Natural stone kitchen top cleaner See more
